title: Moroccan Pork Belly Msemen
description: A rich and spicy Moroccan-inspired dish featuring slow-cooked pork belly wrapped inside msemen, a traditional North African pancake.
instructions: Season the pork belly with salt, black pepper, and moroccan spice blend.
Place the pork belly on a baking sheet and cook for 2 hours, or until tender.
While the pork is cooking, heat a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the diced onion and cook until caramelized, about 20 minutes.
Add the pungent chili flakes and cook for an additional minute.
Wrap each msemen piece around a portion of the cooked pork belly and onion mixture.
Optional: serve with a side of moroccan harissa for added heat.
